message:
fix(tests): Re-enable all tests - let watchdog catch codegen bugs

Re-enabled test_contextlib, test_grammar, and test_raise.

These files have codegen bugs (infinite loops/crashes), but disabling
them hides the problem. Instead:

- Tests stay enabled and visible
- Watchdog will timeout after 5min and report the hanging file
- CI will fail properly showing which tests timeout
- Bugs remain visible and tracked, not hidden

The real fix is debugging the codegen bugs, not hiding them.

files.patch:
@@ -3,8 +3,8 @@ compiler_codegen
 complex
 configparser
 contains
-# contextlib  # DISABLED: causes infinite loop in codegen (issue #TBD)
-# contextlib_async  # DISABLED: part of contextlib group
+contextlib
+contextlib_async
 copy
 copyreg
 coroutines

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ getopt
 getpass
 gettext
 global
-# grammar  # DISABLED: crashes with SIGILL during codegen
+grammar
 graphlib
 gzip
 hashlib

@@ -43,4 +43,4 @@ pyclbr
 pyexpat
 queue
 quopri
-# raise  # DISABLED: hangs in Phase 1 codegen (infinite loop)
+raise
